response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:13: Identified the rhythm game music as 'Second Heaven' by Ryu☆. Samples are vocal, so marked as 'contains_vocal_music: true'. 2. 03:14-04:58: Identified the song '大見解' (Daikenkai) from on-screen text. Credited to 'Des-ROW'. Performers are Shiranui Flare and Shirogane Noel. 3. Lyrics for 'Second Heaven' were retrieved from BEMANI lyrics wiki. Lyrics for '大見解' were transcribed from the provided video's on-screen subtitles as official lyrics were not available in external search results.
response.global_summary: The video shows a live performance by VTuber Shiranui Flare during her birthday festival. It begins with her playing the rhythm game 'Pop'n music', which features the song 'Second Heaven'. This is followed by a live vocal performance of the song '大見解' (Daikenkai) by Shiranui Flare and Shirogane Noel.

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare plays the rhythm game 'Pop'n music', featuring the song 'Second Heaven' in the background while talking to the audience.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
All I want lying here with you, feeling like heaven.
All I want lying here with you, feeling like heaven.
Count down...
8... 7... 6... 5... 4, 3, 2, 1.
Somebody's scream!
